summary: Vertical phone footage at an airport curbside drop-off under a metal canopy. A man in a black tactical vest stands behind yellow caution tape speaking with two travelers, one in a white shirt and cap with a backpack and one in a camouflage-pattern shirt with a rolling suitcase; an open cooler sits in the foreground and a 'Passenger Drop-Off' sign and area '3A' marker are visible. The audio is bystanders commenting on ICE agents checking bags at the airport. The tweet describes ICE officers assisting TSA during the shutdown.

script.scene: Man in a black tactical vest behind yellow tape talks with two travelers at an airport curbside; open cooler in foreground; 'Passenger Drop-Off' sign.
